top_signals.title: Nasdaq tumbles 4% as shares in chip and memory groups sink
top_signals.summary: Rising expectations of Federal Reserve rate rise send US bond yields rising sharply
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gold price erases year’s gains as rate hike chances surge
top_signals.summary: Spot gold declined as much as 3% to $4,330 an ounce, its lowest since March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Turns Rosy on Tesla a Day After Dimon Lauds Musk
top_signals.summary: The morning after Jamie Dimon offered Elon Musk an audience to talk up SpaceX, JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s new lead autos analyst completely changed the bank’s tune on Tesla Inc.

top_signals.title: Bond investors bet Colombia’s ‘Tiger’ will slash public spending
top_signals.summary: Rightwing populist Abelardo de la Espriella goes into second-round presidential vote

top_signals.title: Apple removes Russia’s state-backed messaging app Max from its store
top_signals.summary: Russian authorities have promoted Max as a domestic alternative to foreign messaging platforms such as Telegram and WhatsApp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Litus, Uwin Nanotech to collaborate on critical minerals recovery tech
top_signals.summary: The partners would explore the use of Litus’ proprietary nanomaterial composite and advanced separation processes.
